title: 电脑被植入了恶意广告弹窗 popAD.exe 求各位大佬帮忙
content: A user reports that a malicious ad‑popup program, popAD.exe, randomly launches on their Windows 10 PC from C:\Windows\SysWOW64\config\systemprofile\AppData\Roaming\. The executable masquerades as Sogou Input Method, leads to iii3.net, and is signed by Shenzhen Judian Huyu Cultural Media Co. Termination of Sogou or the file alone does not stop it; it respawns through PerceptionSimulationService.exe → backgroundTaskHost.exe → popAD.exe. The user listed many DLLs loaded by popAD.exe but requires help identifying the root cause and removal method.

title: humanize-text 一个开源的 AI 文本拟人化工具集
content: Humanize-Text is an open‑source toolkit that rewrites AI‑generated text to sound more natural. It offers four methods: 1) a multilingual translation chain that reshapes sentences via intermediate languages; 2) multi‑round LLM rewriting that adjusts rhythm and vocabulary while maintaining context; 3) a feedback loop using multiple detection signals to refine paragraphs; and 4) a hybrid NMT approach that blends outputs from several translation engines to reduce engine fingerprints. Each method has trade‑offs in accuracy, speed, and resource needs.

title: tikrok 的部分来时路
content: Tikrok released a comprehensive update on 2026-05-19, upgrading the README to a seventh‑generation architecture, refactoring the sqlc data layer, and replacing older interfaces with cleanly testable abstractions. The project moved critical components into isolated “gen” RPC modules, switched to Go’s sqlc+Goose for type‑safe database access, and removed GORM. Security enhancements include Vault‑protected configs, API key handling, and CORS fixes. Deployment was streamlined with multi‑stage Docker images, automated versioning, and Ansible, while extensive unit, integration, and Bash API tests were added.

title: Rebuilding The American Shipyard
content: The podcast discusses rebuilding America’s defense industrial base amid rising competition. Participants emphasize shifting to faster, larger‑scale, modern manufacturing and integrating autonomous systems into production and design. They argue for structural changes in how the Department of Defense partners with industry, greater reliance on commercial markets, and alignment of private capital with national goals to strengthen fragile supply chains and improve resilience. The conversation explores how software‑centric, autonomous platforms can reduce cost and complexity in defense.

title: 600亿，又一家造车新势力宣布破产
content: Feniks Motors, founded by famed designer Henrik Fisker, filed for bankruptcy after delivering about 12 000 Ocean SUVs, leaving owners stranded.  A volunteer group, the Fisker Owners Association, used reverse engineering, global sourcing, and mobile repair to sustain the fleet, even replacing discontinued OTA services and securing insurance.  Fisker's collapse illustrates the difficulty of turning elegant design into viable manufacturing: despite high‑profile backing, cash flow and supply‑chain issues doomed the venture.

title: 大厂HR：AI时代，我们招什么人？
content: Large tech firms now require AI fluency across all roles. Job descriptions shift from traditional titles to “full‑stack AI engineer” or “AI‑powered specialist.” CVs must detail specific AI projects, outcomes, and business impact rather than generic tool familiarity. AI tools are a baseline skill; experience with prompts, model fine‑tuning, and AI‑driven automation is essential. The focus is on measurable results, curiosity, and the ability to incorporate AI into business processes, making those who can do this highly valued.

title: 方岱宁院士逝世，享年 68 岁，你对他的成果和经历有哪些印象？
content: Academician Fang Daining, a leading expert in advanced materials and structural mechanics, died at 68. Born in Nanchang in 1958, he earned a master’s from Nanjing University of Technology and a Ph.D. from Technion, Israel. He held senior roles at Tsinghua University, Peking University, and Beijing Institute of Technology, where he served as vice‑president. Elected to the Chinese Academy of Sciences in 2013 and a foreign member of the National Academy of Engineering in 2022, he pioneered theories of ferroelectric‑ferromagnetic deformation, multiscale computation, and high‑temperature testing, earning two State Natural Science Awards.

DenCloud performed best, producing near‑complete PPTs for free, earning 8/10.  
KIMI offered similar quality but required a paid account, rated 7/10.  
ChatGPT’s web version produced poor layout and content, 4/10.

The author tested these in 3–4 days and seeks recommendations for better solutions.

content: Oil price shocks have spurred economic shifts across Southeast Asia, driving demand for medical tourism and expanding casino development. The rapid rise in energy costs has prompted governments to diversify revenue streams, with some turning to gambling industries and healthcare services as new growth sectors. This shift reflects broader efforts to mitigate the impact of volatile energy markets on regional economies.

title: OpenAI世纪诉讼，马斯克输了
content: Elon Musk’s $1500 billion lawsuit against OpenAI was unanimously dismissed by a jury in 90 minutes, citing that the claims were time‑barred. The case, which followed a three‑week trial with extensive testimony and evidence, was dismissed on procedural grounds rather than substantive merits. Musk plans to appeal, while OpenAI and Microsoft move forward with high‑value IPO and partnership plans amid ongoing related litigation.

title: 巴西公布世界杯 26 人名单，内马尔回归，7 大名将落选，你对该球队有哪些期待？这支球队能走多远？
content: Brazil has announced its 26‑man squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup in the United States, Canada, and Mexico. The roster features 34‑year‑old Neymar’s return, alongside stars like Vinícius Jr., Raphinha, Casemiro, and Kalidou Koulibaly. Notable omissions include João Pedro, Thiago Silva, Anthony, Hector, and injured players Militao, Estavinho, and Rodrigo. Brazil will face Morocco in Group C’s opening match on June 14.

title: 陪审团驳回马斯克对OpenAI的指控，裁定起诉已过诉讼时效

title: 9.9元起，三大运营商杀入Token生意，以后用AI就像交话费？
content: The three major Chinese telecom operators—China Telecom, China Mobile, and China Unicom—have begun selling token packages that allow customers to use AI large‑model services. Prices start around 9.9 CNY per month for 10 million tokens, with higher tiers for developers, small businesses, and households. The plans mimic traditional data bundles, using existing account and telecom payment systems, making AI access easier for consumers. This move marks token consumption as a potential new core revenue line for operators, expanding AI into mainstream usage.

title: 宁波举办「上课偷吃大赛」爆火，如何评价这种活动形式？为何学生时代的「违规行为」会成为成年人的快乐源泉？
content: 宁波商场举办的「上课偷吃大赛」吸引了从幼儿园儿童到六七十岁老人的广泛参与。参赛者们利用书本遮挡、假装揉眼等神操作，只为在「老师」转头时偷偷吃上一口泡饭或煎饼。 这种将过去带有惩罚风险的「违规行为」转化为无害的集体游戏，能够有效激活人们的童年记忆并释放当下压力。躲避老师监管的刺激感…

title: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT 个人理财工具：引入 GPT-5.5 并支持连接万家银行账户
content: OpenAI released a preview of a personal finance tool for ChatGPT Pro users on May 15. The feature connects to users' bank accounts through Plaid, enabling spending analysis, asset tracking, and long‑term financial planning. Powered by GPT‑5.5 and built on the acquired Hiro team’s technology, it supports over 12,000 financial institutions. The service is available on web and iOS, with plans to extend to Plus users after Pro‑user feedback, illustrating AI moving toward specialized, agent‑based finance applications.

title: DeepSeek 疑似出 Bug：可一键「偷窥」别人正在问什么
content: A user reported a potential bug on DeepSeek’s web interface. With fast mode enabled and online search turned off, the AI displayed fragments of other users’ conversations in its responses. Repeat tests confirmed the issue, and comments mentioned concerns about privacy, such as seeing personal predictions and birth charts. Experts who examined the algorithm suggested it was not a simple bug, and other large models like Yuanbao, Diabo, and Niuhao did not show the same behavior. The problem remains unresolved.

title: 腾讯 AI 设计智能体协作平台 Ardot 正式开启公测
content: Tencent’s AI design collaboration platform, Ardot, has entered public beta. It enables real‑time multi‑user cooperation for UI/UX design, targeting designers and product managers. Users describe interface requirements in natural language, and Ardot streams editable design drafts that can be converted to code with one click. The tool also imports Figma files, allowing zero‑cost migration and coverage of the complete software design workflow.

title: 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋痛斥将 GPU 比作核武器，并反对 AI 芯片出口管制
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang criticized calls to compare AI GPUs with nuclear weapons and opposed export controls on AI chips. In a Stanford guest lecture streamed on YouTube, he argued that such controls are ineffective, counterproductive, and would harm U.S. technological advantage. Huang maintained that the U.S. should continue to use its own technology ecosystem and that restricting other countries would damage the United States itself.

title: 三星电子与工会展开最后谈判，以避免威胁全球供应链的罢工
content: On Monday, Samsung Electronics began a new round of negotiations with its union to avoid an 18‑day strike that would start on Thursday amid a global memory‑chip shortage. A prior bargaining attempt failed; the court partially upheld Samsung’s request to limit union actions, threatening large fines for production interference. Samsung’s shares rose after the ruling. Korean officials, including the president and prime minister, urged fair resolution and pledged emergency arbitration to stop the strike. The union said it would not agree to a settlement if the pay proposal was insufficient. The government‑led talks continue through Tuesday.

title: 贝恩资本完成 105 亿美元亚洲基金的募集
content: Bain Capital has closed its sixth Asia-focused private equity fund, raising about $10.5 billion—exceeding the $7 billion target, with $9.1 billion from external commitments. The successful fundraising, amid market volatility and geopolitical uncertainty, signals strong investor interest in Asia, especially Japan. The firm previously raised $7.1 billion for its fifth fund in 2023 and maintains significant operations in Greater China and India.

title: 百度 AI 云一季度收入 88 亿元，同比增 79%
content: Baidu released its Q1 2026 financial report, reporting AI Cloud revenue of 8.8 billion yuan, up 79% year‑over‑year, and GPU Cloud revenue growing 184% year‑over‑year. The company upgraded its Intelligent Cloud to a full‑stack AI platform tailored for large‑scale agent applications, enhancing end‑to‑end collaboration and providing a foundation for agent development.

title: SpaceX 正式启动「1 拆 5」拆股计划 为史上最大 IPO 扫清「高价」障碍
content: SpaceX has begun a 1‑to‑5 share split, reducing the IPO share price from $526.59 to about $105.32. The split, expected to complete by May 22, aims to lower the high valuation barrier for its planned IPO—targeting a $2 trillion valuation. The company intends to list on June 12, with major investors like BlackRock and a Saudi fund reportedly interested. The split is part of preparations for what is projected to be the largest IPO ever.

content: Swedish Lake Vättern, the continent’s premier salmon and trout habitat, annually yields about 600 t of fish for global markets. During spring, around 80 experienced fishermen gather to harvest in the lake’s calm 2,000 km² waters, a vital source for seafood lovers. A recent study, however, revealed serious pollution in this top salmon source, threatening the lake’s ecology and the industry’s future.

title: Take your local GitHub sessions anywhere
content: GitHub Copilot now lets developers run and manage Copilot sessions across any device. By enabling /remote on a session started in VS Code, the CLI, or JetBrains IDEs, the session appears on github.com and the GitHub Mobile app. Users can monitor real‑time progress, send follow‑up instructions, approve permissions, and complete tasks like PR creation from their phone or web, all while sessions remain private. This feature unifies workflows across desktop, web, and mobile.

title: 做了个让 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 共享记忆的小工具
content: This project, named Engram, stores personal identity, preferences, communication habits, and project decisions in a local JSON file. Through MCP (a cross‑AI messaging protocol), multiple AI tools—Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.—can read and apply the same memory, eliminating repetitive explanations for each session or tool. The data remains editable locally, and Engram is product‑agnostic, enabling consistent behavior across different AI platforms. The source code is available on GitHub.

title: 我的一人公司AI视频团队，被腾讯收编了
content: The author, a solo developer named Kangaroo‑King, built an automated AI “product promotion team” that uses HyperFrames and AI agents to produce promotional videos. The system splits work into stages—product evaluation, brief, storyboard, asset gathering, editing, and music—each handled by separate agents. His tool was adopted by Tencent’s WorkBuddy platform as a ready‑made “Expert Team” for video creation. He discusses the value of pre‑built AI teams for one‑person businesses and offers the open‑source skills for developers.

title: KPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance
